MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admissions To Defendant Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admissions To Defendant Admitted is adopted as follows:

The unopposed Motion is granted. The matters set forth in Plaintiffs Requests for Admissions, Set One are deemed admitted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is to prepare a proposed form of order, and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Tom Cohen for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Matter not reported. (302/JPT)
